title: Research Brief Builder
description: Formulate a coherent research brief that connects a marketing decision to questions, objectives, scope, assumptions, constraints, and evidence criteria.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AI Persona Testing
Marketing Research
Research Brief Builder

learningObjectives: Formulate a coherent research brief that connects a marketing decision to questions, objectives, scope, assumptions, constraints, and evidence criteria.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with customer research and AI personas

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
